name: Iso11783MakeName
title: Iso11783MakeName
syntax: void Iso11783MakeName( char[] retDeviceName, long selfConfiguring, long industryGroup, long deviceClassInstance, long deviceClass, long function, long functionInstance, long ECUInstance, long manufacturerCode, long identityNumber );
description: This function creates a Iso11783 device name.
The parameter retDeviceName must be an array with size 8. It will be filled with the device name.

parameters.name: retDeviceName
parameters.description: Device name is copied in this buffer (must be 8 bytes)
